title: Better Snowballs
description: Adds custom animated snowballs with freeze effect
body:
# `❄️` Better Snowballs - Enhanced Snowball Mechanics

Adds rotating 3D models and freeze effect to snowballs. Customizable size, texture, and rotation speed.

---

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EEjZWD5xDx4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## `✨` Features
* `🎨` **Custom 3D Models** - Replace snowball texture with any skull texture
* `❄️` **Freeze Effect** - Hit players freeze on impact (configurable duration)
* `⚡` **No Resource Pack Required** - Uses [Display Entities](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/dev/display-entities/)
* `⚙️` **Fully Configurable** - Customize appearance, rotation speed, and freeze duration

---
